body.itemA: Client tools: tools that run in YOUR application. Includes user-defined tools (custom functions you write) and Anthropic-schema tools (bash, text_editor). Claude returns a tool_use block, you execute it locally, and send back a tool_result.
body.itemB: Server tools: tools that run on Anthropic's infrastructure. Includes web_search, code_execution, web_fetch, and tool_search. You just declare them in the request — Anthropic handles execution and returns results directly in the response.

dimensions.name: You handle tool_result?
dimensions.a: Yes — you must send results back

dimensions.name: Setup effort
dimensions.b: Just declare the tool type in the request
